taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Data Science, Economics, Machine Learning Engineering, Python, R
skill_match_scores: Data Science:1.0, Economics:0.0, Machine Learning Engineering:1.0, Python:1.0, R:0.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years of industry experience in data science, economics, analytics, or machine learning engineering, Advanced Degree in computer science, statistics, or a related field, Proficiency in scripting languages (Python, R, or similar) and big data query/processing languages and tools such as SQL, Hive, Spark, and Airflow, Experience building or working with event-based analytics systems, Familiarity with machine learning methods for classification, clustering, or anomaly detection, Ability to work cross-functionally with engineering and product
preferred_quals: Experience working in Fraud/Risk/Trust & Safety teams, Experience developing internal tooling for analytics, operations, or user lifecycle workflows (e.g., onboarding, review systems, or risk signals), using platforms like Retool, Appsmith, or comparable frameworks, Experience working in real money gaming or other high-velocity transaction environments, Comfortable writing light JavaScript in data/UI workflows
core_responsibilities: Collaborate with product leaders to optimize our onboarding funnel to identify friction and areas for improvement, Build scalable analytics systems for continuous evaluation of user journeys and defining key metrics, Partner with engineering to implement real-time event tracking (Firebase, Amplitude etc), Define schemas and instrumentation for user activity (account creation, sessions, device/IP data etc), Collaborate on systems that balance user friction with platform integrity, Build analytical frameworks to surface signals that inform adaptive user flows (dynamic verification requirements etc), Establish prevalence measurement methodologies to quantify fraudulent activities on the platform, Partner with our operations teams to triage and mitigate any ongoing threats to the platform, Classify transaction risk (payment method, account-level signals), Apply clustering, anomaly detection etc to large scale behavioral data
job_summary: Sleeper is a sports-focused games platform driven by a passion for sports and innovation. They are seeking a Data Scientist to enhance user experience and platform integrity by analyzing player behavior, detecting fraud, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to improve onboarding and user journeys.
